name: Layla Al-Khaldi
whatsapp_message:
السلام عليكم يا ليلى 👋
لاحظنا أنك حصلتِ على 15/100 في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسني درجاتك قبل الاختبار الجاي في 6 أيام 💪
هل نقدر نتواصل اليوم عشان نخطط طريقة تساعدك تركزي أكثر؟
action: Schedule an urgent one-on-one session with Layla today or tomorrow to conduct a diagnostic assessment and create a personalized 6-day study plan before the next quiz.
reasoning: Layla has never been contacted despite critical risk status and a failing quiz score of 15/100, making this her first intervention opportunity. With only 6 days until the next quiz and no established facilitator relationship, immediate personalized support is essential to prevent further academic decline.
